name: canva
description: An intuitive online design platform that makes graphic design accessible to everyone with templates and drag-and-drop elements.
bestUseCases: Quick social media graphics, presentations, and posters
pricingDetails: Free tier available. Canva Pro starts at $12.99/month.

name: figma
description: A collaborative web-based vector graphics editor and prototyping tool for modern interface design.
bestUseCases: UI/UX design, wireframing, and real-time collaborative design systems
pricingDetails: Free tier for individuals. Professional plan starts at $12/editor/month.

name: Capcut
description: An all-in-one video editing software that make it incredibly simple to create visually striking videos.
bestUseCases: Short-form content, Reels, TikToks, and quick social media edits
pricingDetails: Free basic features. Pro starts at $7.99/month.

name: DaVinci Resolve
description: An industry-standard professional video editor combining editing, color correction, visual effects, and audio post-production.
bestUseCase: High-end cinematic video editing, professional color grading, and VFX
pricingDetails: Free version is fully featured. Studio edition is a $295 one-time fee.

name: Adobe Premiere Pro
description: A leading timeline-based video editing software application developed by Adobe Systems.
bestUseCase: Commercials, long-form films, and broadcast editing
pricingDetails: No free tier. Single app subscription is $22.99/month.

name: Descript
description: An audio/video editor makes as easy as editing a text document. Edit video by editing text.
bestUseCase: Podcasts, talking-head videos, and screen recordings
pricingDetails: Free up to 1 hour/month. Creator plan starts at $12/month.
strengths: Transcribe and edit by deleting words
Studio soung quality with one click

name: Photopea
descritpion: A free advanced photo editor that supports PSD, XCF, Sketch, XD and CDR formats directly in your browser.
bestUseCase: Free web-based Photoshop alternative for quick mockups and edits
pricingDetails: 100% free with non-intrusive ads. Ad-free starts at $5/month.
strengths: Supports PSD layer groups and styles

name: Visual Studio Code
description: A lightweight but powerful source code editor that runs on your desktop and comes with rich extensions.
bestUseCase: General purpose web development, scripting, and backend coding

name: Cursor AI
description: An AI-first code editor designed to make programming extremely fast by embedding AI directly in the editing pane.
bestUseCase: AI-assisted coding, codebase search, and automated refactoring
pricingDetails: Free tier with limits. Pro plan is $20/month.

name: Replit
description: A collaborative browser-based IDE that lets you build, test, and deploy applications instantly without any local setup.
